headline: Is Carnival Rewriting the Cruise Industry's Growth Playbook?
summary: CCL is pairing measured fleet growth with exclusive destinations and stronger bookings to build a more durable cruise growth strategy.

raw.headline: Is Carnival Rewriting the Cruise Industry's Growth Playbook?
raw.summary: CCL is pairing measured fleet growth with exclusive destinations and stronger bookings to build a more durable cruise growth strategy.

headline: Holland America and Rolling Stone Debut New Rock Show on Oosterdam; One of Four New World Stage Productions Created with RWS Global
summary: Four new shows are taking center stage on Holland America Line's Oosterdam, expanding the cruise line's award-winning entertainment lineup with fresh productions and iconic collaborations. The four original shows were created exclusively for Holland America Line in partnership with RWS Global, the world leader in live moments across entertainment and sports.

headline: Carnival: Fuel/Demand Risks Depress Near-Term Recovery Prospects; Contrarian Buy
summary: Carnival analysis: discounted valuation, stronger balance sheet, 2.3% dividend, and booking trends suggest 72% upside to $45. Click to read more on CCL.
